subtitle: James returns from leave, Marie on annual leave
context: James Salas Guillen returns today after annual leave (8-18 June away). Marie Cooksey is on annual leave 8-13 June. Multiple system issues need attention: HRIS Dashboard workflow failures, Halo ER review pending product owner recovery, and IM Principles URL migration deadline approaching (23-24 June).

urgent.title: James A/L Handover - Review and action items
urgent.sub: James returns today after annual leave. Review his H&S handover document for outstanding items requiring immediate attention.
urgent.subject: H&S Handover

urgent.title: IM Principles URL migration - Update links by 23 June
urgent.sub: Laura confirmed new URL goes live, old page comes down 23-24 June. Verify and update all PXD links.
urgent.subject: RE: IM Principles - change to URL

urgent.title: HRIS Dashboard workflow failures - Investigate and fix
urgent.sub: Multiple GitHub workflow runs failed on 4 June. Dashboard updates not running - requires technical investigation.
urgent.subject: [begb0037admin/hris-dashboard] Run failed: Update HRIS Dashboard

needs.title: Halo ER Case Management - Reschedule review meeting
needs.sub: Natasha Heaton reports product owner still off sick. Coordinate with Viktoriia Vasyliuta to set review date when PO returns.
needs.subject: Re: Halo ER Case Management Support Operating Model - Approval Confirmation

needs.title: HR Systems Bulletin - Submit content if needed
needs.sub: HR Systems Communications call for content for June 2026 bulletin shared with PeopleXD and reporting tools users.
needs.subject: Call for content - HR Systems Bulletin (June 2026)

needs.title: Cority DSE data import - Confirm live status
needs.sub: James confirmed PXD to Cardinus upload is live. Marie requesting confirmation of manual record creation process for contractors.
needs.subject: RE: DSE Update - user data import and upload to Cardinus

fyi.title: Michael O'Sullivan returns from leave
fyi.sub: Out-of-office auto-reply received. Returns Monday 8 June for 1-1 session.
fyi.subject: Automatic reply: Michael O'Sullivan - 1-1 Session

fyi.sub: Tracy Fahey confirms HR staff updates document now live on intranet.
fyi.subject: RE: Trinity term HR Policy newsletter

fyi.title: Access Support cases resolved
fyi.sub: Multiple Access cases (68981820, 68981549) closed. Related to bulk delete assignments and system configuration.
fyi.subject: Access Support Team - Case Updates

fyi.subject: [143a] Turnover and Retention Dashboard - Sprint Review Meeting
